creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
The port sysutils/memtest86+ fails to build:


make all
make[4]: illegal argument to -j -- must be positive integer!
gmake[3]: *** [iso] Error 1
gmake[3]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/sysutils/memtest86+/work/memtest86+-4.20'
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to

How-To-Repeat: Try building port sysutils/memtest86+
